ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_number" INTEGER /* Game number within the season */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (Home or Away) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team playing */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win, Loss, Tie) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (Regular Season, Playoffs, Pre-season) */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network that broadcast the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home stadium */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach */,
  "team_president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team president or general manager */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR, DB) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number of the player */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's photo */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the event occurred in */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., touchdown, interception, sack) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event in the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the event */,
  "event_quarter" TEXT /* Quarter in which the event occurred */,
  "event_yards" INTEGER /* Number of yards associated with the event (if applicable) */,
  "event_score_change" INTEGER /* Change in score due to the event */,
  "event_video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video clip of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
